title: oenothera xenogaura
intro: Oenothera xenogaura, also known as Evening Primrose, is a flowering plant species in the evening primrose family. The plant is valued for its seeds, which are rich in gamma-linolenic acid (GLA), a polyunsaturated fatty acid with anti-inflammatory properties. The medicinal properties of Oenothera xenogaura include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce inflammation, and alleviate symptoms of menopause and PMS, making it beneficial for skin health, menstrual health, and heart health. Herbal preparations of Oenothera xenogaura typically involve cold-pressing or extracting the seeds to produce oil, capsules, or tinctures that can be used to support various health benefits.
